name: Philip Morris International Inc.
description: Philip Morris International Inc. (PMI) is a leading international tobacco and nicotine company working to deliver a smoke-free future. While historically known for its cigarette brands, such as Marlboro, the company is actively evolving its portfolio to include smoke-free products, including heated tobacco, e-vapor, and oral nicotine alternatives. Headquartered in Switzerland, PMI operates in over 180 countries, focusing its scientific research and commercial efforts on tobacco harm reduction to provide better alternatives for adult smokers who would otherwise continue to smoke, while expanding into broader consumer wellness and healthcare sectors.
